parameters.name: phase_step
parameters.override_behavior: sets normalized phase increment per timer event

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic timer-updated normalized phase with manual modulo wrap.
Use rail-referenced smoothed voltage contributions only.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), validation hooks, or simulator-specific side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: On every dt timer event, normalized phase advances by phase_step.
The phase state wraps modulo one and never grows unbounded.
Phase_out equals wrapped normalized phase scaled by the local VDD-minus-VSS rail span.
Clk_out is rail-high while normalized phase is below 0.5 and low while phase is at or above 0.5.
Changing dt or phase_step changes the observable phase and clock cadence according to the same update and wrap rules.

title: Digital Phase Accumulator With Modulo Wrap
